behavior_summary: Handles game logic when an item or actor contacts water: plays/controls splash SFX, creates splash sprites, and spawns timed splash/particle visuals.

If the contacting entity is an NPC, runs NPC-specific handling (play water animation, possibly teleport, damage, or mark dead), with special handling when the NPC is the avatar (camera/stasis adjustments).
Contains a one-time special-case for a named character ('Devon') guarded by the global flag DevonHitWater to play a unique splash/voice and then set that flag so it does not repeat.
Uses helper routines to spawn multiple transient particle items (U8P_WATER::func03A8) and to create/advance/destroy individual splash particles (U8P_WATER::func0405).
Respects a global guard neverSinks to skip sinking/particle behavior when set.
notable_control_flow: Early-exit when param1 != 0 and param2 == 0: checks Item::isOn(this, param1) and returns if the item is not on the trigger tile.
Guarded branch around global neverSinks: if neverSinks is true then splash/particle/sinking behavior is bypassed.
Devon special-case: if local3 equals Devon identity and DevonHitWater is false, play unique SFX/create sprite and then write DevonHitWater = 1 (one-shot behavior).
NPC branch: when the item is an NPC, branch into avatar-vs-NPC handling (avatar id == 1 triggers stasis/camera changes); run Npc::doAnim and then post-animation life/teleport/damage logic.
Particle loop: U8P_WATER::func03A8 loops from 1..count calling U8P_WATER::func0405 and spawning a short FREE helper (FREE::func1C19) between iterations to space spawns.
open_questions: Exact meanings of param1 and param2 in U8P_WATER::func0080 (inferred as item/NPC id and selector/flag) — confirm with engine signature.
Precise SFX and sprite resource ids used for the Devon special-case and general splash (IDs are present in binary but not mapped here).
Whether NPC post-animation handling always kills the NPC, teleports it, or applies damage depending on status bits — the decompilation shows multiple branches but not full resolution.
The exact numeric identity that maps to 'Devon' (local3 == 0x02 is inferred but not guaranteed).
How neverSinks is set and whether it protects only visual/sink effects or also prevents damage/removal of NPCs/items.

main_function.name: U8P_WATER::func0080
main_function.purpose: Orchestrate splash visuals/sounds and handle item/NPC interactions with water (spawn particle effects, play/stop SFX, and run NPC-specific animation and life/teleport/damage handling).
entry_conditions: Called when an item/actor contacts or enters a water trigger region (inferred from calls to Item::getPoint and splash/particle creation).
param1 == 0 vs non-zero and param2 == 0 are used to gate an early 'isOn' check (so caller may pass an item id or 0).
Executes only when global neverSinks is false for sinking/particle behavior.

function_map.name: U8P_WATER::func0080
function_map.role: Entry handler for water-contact events: controls SFX, sprite spawn, particle spawning, and NPC-specific water behavior.

function_map.name: U8P_WATER::func03A8
function_map.role: Spawn loop that repeatedly calls the single-particle creator to generate multiple splash particles with timed spacing.

function_map.name: U8P_WATER::func0405
function_map.role: Create and advance/destroy a single transient splash/particle item (Item::legal_create, getFrame, setFrame, destroy).

function_map.name: Item::*
function_map.role: Engine item API used for querying position/status and creating/destroying transient particle items.

function_map.name: Npc::*
function_map.role: Engine NPC API used for animations, death/immortality flags, teleporting and receiveHit (damage).

function_map.name: FREE::func1C19
function_map.role: Short helper process spawned to introduce timing/delay between particle spawns or SFX stops (spawn + suspend pattern).

internal_calls.purpose: Generate multiple transient splash particles at the impact point (passes Item::getPoint output and a particle count).
Create a single splash particle each loop iteration as part of the multi-particle spawn.

external_calls.purpose: Read position of the impacting item/NPC to place splash sprites and pass coordinates to the particle spawner.
Query and stop previously-playing water-related SFX, then play Devon-specific or generic splash SFX.
Create splash/impact sprite at computed coordinates for visual feedback.
Play a water-fall/impact animation for NPCs that fall into water and suspend until it completes.
Post-animation handling for NPCs: potentially teleport, move, damage, or remove an NPC and destroy its contents depending on status/branches.
Spawn a short-lived helper process to create a delay between successive particle creations; caller suspends to wait.
Create the transient particle item, allow it to advance a frame or be destroyed when its terminal frame is reached.
Adjust camera/controls and reset system references when the avatar or NPC undergoes the water animation/handling (avoid input or dangling refs).

reads.name: neverSinks
reads.likely_effect: When true, suppress sinking/particle/splash behavior; used as a guard to skip most visual/physics effects.

reads.name: DevonHitWater
reads.likely_effect: Checked to prevent replaying Devon's unique splash/voice; read before triggering the Devon special-case.

writes.name: DevonHitWater
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when Devon's one-time splash/voice is triggered so it does not repeat later.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Handles game logic when an item or actor contacts water: plays/controls splash SFX, creates splash sprites, and spawns timed splash/particle visuals.
